textByHashes.015ccb4a6bfd7e9db54aafc70d6d0f6c215b022d: You're the one helping to find our son.
textByHashes.a77d54d7066927d308178ed31159993d3e11724a: It's good that you're here to help. Artur is a good lad, but he does have a habit of biting off more than he can chew.
textByHashes.1bea37ca99c005396c33927962e8683a15478207: He's meant for greatness you know. He'll be a king one day.
textByHashes.bf5e49d57ced82f1e7b59f892a1046cd675a75a7: Lord. I meant to say lord. Now be on your way. Artur needs your help.
textByHashes.854f0b263963d6bd1e80683b56d2f357d8429657: Thank you for finding our son. You've done this kingdom a great service.
textByHashes.da0e13d86c447a99123f888e8b4b2f39e6b43018: I do wonder if his father could have done more though. My brother would have had the entire army out searching.
textByHashes.da0394ccf3f5406ef89bf65d92c7b5b6581e9737: My brother is Lord Shiro Shayzien. He commands the Shayzien Army. A luxury my husband doesn't have.
textByHashes.776e1dd25569b810a7e6ec77ec13ec53fa38e908: Maybe it doesn't always have to be that way. Things may well soon be different. Now be on your way, I have things to do.
textByHashes.cf9c25fbbb1f8e599397a844709910b6dda4909e: You should not dispense formalities Artur. A king should command respect.
textByHashes.5749f8e5ece535180b41088baa05da710f5772cf: Thank you for finding our son, you've done this kingdom a great service.
textByHashes.59ef3b27ffd9203bb7c8263c737df80fa44b42b1: Isn't this wonderful! My son on the throne. I always knew he'd do great things.
textByHashes.af2268a5b0a4e9660f74f64b3b2b5f72ff45a1c8: Oh yes, terrible business. It breaks Artur's heart not to have him around.
textByHashes.6c0a9604d257e597395f3b17931da60df5dd5c1d: Still, always best to focus on the positives I say.
